results.question: Tell me about yourself.

results.question: Walk me through your background.
results.actual_answer: I'm Evin John. I started out as a Software Engineer Intern – AWS & XR Streaming and I'm now an AI & Full Stack Engineer Intern at EstroTech Robotics. I work mainly with Java, C++, Python, and TypeScript.

results.question: What is your current role?
results.actual_answer: My experience includes AI & Full Stack Engineer Intern at EstroTech Robotics — Developed a cross-platform AI Kiosk product using React, integrating NLP models with retail databases to deliver real-time support across web and IoT interfaces.; Software Engineer Intern – AWS & XR Streaming at Aetherbot AI — Engineered a scalable pixel-streaming pipeline for Unreal Engine 5 on AWS EC2, enabling real-time browser-based avatar interaction with sub-80ms latency..

results.question: What are your top skills?
results.actual_answer: My core technical stack centers on full-stack development and AI integration. I work extensively with Python, TypeScript, and Java, building scalable backends with FastAPI and Node.js alongside frontend interfaces in React and Next.js. I also have strong experience in database management with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis, and I frequently apply machine learning libraries like PyTorch and Scikit-learn to build intelligent features.

results.question: What projects have you worked on?
results.expected_behavior: Lists real projects from structured resume.
results.actual_answer: My projects include TalentScope – Real-Time Technical Interview Platform — Engineered a collaborative remote-hiring platform unifying HD video calls and a synchronized code execution environment, reducing context switching and enabling seamless technical assessments for engineering teams. Architected a low-latency state synchronization system via Convex and Stream SDK, achieving sub-100ms updates for bi-directional coding while enforcing strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) using Clerk. (Next.js 14, TypeScript, Convex, and Stream SDK); PriceX – AI Powered Price Comparison Engine — Developed

results.question: Tell me about your best project.
results.expected_behavior: Describes a flagship project from resume.
results.actual_answer: My project TalentScope – Real-Time Technical Interview Platform is Engineered a collaborative remote-hiring platform unifying HD video calls and a synchronized code execution environment, reducing context switching and enabling seamless technical assessments for engineering teams. Architected a low-latency state synchronization system via Convex and Stream SDK, achieving sub-100ms updates for bi-directional coding while enforcing strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) using Clerk. It was built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Convex, Stream SDK, Clerk Auth, and Tailwind CSS.

results.question: Introduce yourself for an interview.
results.actual_answer: I'm Evin John, an AI & Full Stack Engineer Intern at EstroTech Robotics. I work mainly with Java, C++, Python, and TypeScript. One project I'm proud of is TalentScope – Real-Time Technical Interview Platform.

results.question: What technologies are you most experienced with?
results.actual_answer: I have a strong foundation in full-stack development, particularly with the Next.js and React ecosystem on the frontend, and Python-based backends using FastAPI. My experience also spans cloud infrastructure on AWS, database management with PostgreSQL and MongoDB, and implementing AI/ML solutions using PyTorch, LangChain, and Scikit-learn. I'm also comfortable with TypeScript, Node.js, and containerization using Docker to streamline deployment workflows.

results.question: Give me a quick summary of who you are professionally.
results.actual_answer: I'm an AI and Full Stack Engineer with a focus on building high-performance, scalable systems. My background includes developing real-time AI-driven products and cloud-based streaming pipelines, with a strong emphasis on optimizing backend latency and infrastructure efficiency. I’m passionate about bridging the gap between complex machine learning models and seamless user experiences.

results.question: What is your strongest technical strength?
results.actual_answer: My strongest technical strength is architecting high-performance, low-latency systems. Whether I'm building pixel-streaming pipelines for real-time avatar interaction or optimizing backend services for sub-100ms chatbot responses, I focus on the intersection of efficient infrastructure and responsive user experiences. I enjoy the challenge of balancing complex data processing with seamless performance, which has been a consistent theme across my work with AWS, FastAPI, and real-time state synchronization.
